# Fixture reconstructed from public APSB25-94 Adobe advisory (https://helpx.adobe.com/security/products/magento/apsb25-94.html). No operator-local content.
# Simulated nft -a list ruleset output. TEST-NET-3 IPs per RFC 5737.
table inet filter {
	chain input {
		type filter hook input priority filter; policy accept;
		ct state established,related accept # handle 1
		iif "lo" accept # handle 2
		tcp dport 22 accept # handle 3
		tcp dport { 80, 443 } accept # handle 4
		ip saddr 203.0.113.51 drop comment "bl-case CASE-2026-9999" # handle 5
		ip saddr 203.0.113.52 drop # handle 6
	}
	chain forward {
		type filter hook forward priority filter; policy drop;
	}
}
